title: Vacancy for Category Manager at EaseMyTrip Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at EaseMyTrip Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip Holdings Services family as a Category Manager in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip Holdings Services:
EaseMyTrip Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip Holdings Services!
